name: Blur Collection Bid + Floor Sniper
description: Place a collection-wide bid on Blur for an NFT collection at floor × multiplier. Bids are pooled and the lowest seller is filled atomically. Combined with floor-monitor logic, agent buys dips and lists at a margin automatically.
use_case: Agent watches BAYC floor at 12 ETH. Places collection bid at 11.4 ETH (5% below). A whale dumps → agent gets BAYC at 11.4. Lists for 12.5 at +9% margin within 1 block.

verification.criteria: Manual review: bid submitted to Blur API, signed by agent, against an NFT collection in the approved-collections list.
